message: Read the file at project/config.yaml and give me a summary of the configuration.
What's the database pool size set to?
Read data/users.csv and tell me how many users are in each department.
Read scripts/deploy.sh and explain what it does.
The deploy SSH port should be 2222, not 22. Please update deploy.sh.
Actually, we switched the database to db-primary.internal last week. Update config.yaml.
Let's use kebab-case for all new filenames going forward.
Create a new file at project/README.md with a brief description of the widget-api project, referencing the config and deploy script.
Add a section to the README about the database configuration.
